docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF GENEVA ACHOLONU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHONDRA JACKSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISLYN ERALE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-31-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EARLE, CHRISLYN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-31-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, SHONDRA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACHOLONU, GENEVA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EARLE, CHRISLYN $4,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,315.00, COURT FINDS CHRISLYAN EARLE TO BE THE DRIVER OF THE VEHICLE WHICH STRUCK PLAINTIFFS VEHICLE AND TO BE LIABLE FOR THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ACHOLONU, GENEVA
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,300.00 FILED BY ACHOLONU, GENEVA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, SHONDRA EARLE, CHRISLYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
